name: Enbridge Inc.
description: Enbridge Inc. is a leading North American energy infrastructure company. The company operates through five business segments: Liquid Pipelines, Gas Transmission and Midstream, Gas Distribution and Storage, Renewable Power Generation, and Energy Services. Enbridge operates the world's longest and most complex crude oil and liquid transportation system, and is a major transporter of natural gas, delivering energy across Canada and the United States while expanding its portfolio in renewable energy technologies.
